title: AUXSOUL 500 Pieces Wax Craft Sticks Non-Toxic Bendable Wax Sticks 100 Pairs Googly Eyes Kids Crafts Set DIY Crafting Kit for Kids DIY Art Supplies Toys
features: 1.Package Includes: 500 Wax Craft Sticks and 100 Pair eyes. Enough for kids to create the objects what they want.

2.Material: Made of non-toxic wax and yarn, soft and durable.these colorful wax yarn sticks can bend, wrap, twist and stick together so you can create any pattern you want.Can also be used repeatedly.

3.Apply to: these colorful molding sculpting sticks are suitable for home, office, school, car, trip, etc., can be applied as handmade gifts, birthday favors, educational items, travel games, rewards and various DIY projects, lightweight for you to carry with during holiday, will add more fun to your travel.

4.Enhance ability: the flexible wax yarn sticks are suitable for most ages, you can use them to make more 2D and 3D patterns, helpful in improving creativity, hands-on ability and imagination, portable and you can enjoy the DIV fun anytime and anywhere as you want.
5.Let children make their own favorite animals or other creative products by themselves. it is idea gifts and art crafts Eudcational toys for kids.
description: Product description: These wax yarn sticks are foldable and flexible, you can apply different colors to various molding and sculpting, different colors can make your handicraft look colorful and more lovely.
